case_title: AMERICAN AIR TESTING, INC. VS. JONATHAN MACLURE et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO JIM HAECKEL BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-30-2013 AT 8:30 AM.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-30-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT JIM HAECKEL WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LAURA RIERA--CEO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. DEPT 506.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -SIGNED SERVED SEP-12-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MACLURE, JONATHAN DBA SERVICEMASTER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN AIR TESTING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACLURE, JONATHAN DBA SERVICEMASTER SERVICE MASTER $3,254.96 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,334.96, ALL PARTIES AGREE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO INCLUDE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST SERVICEMASTER AS AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST JIM HAECKEL IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
